# Requirements Quality Checklist: Multi-User Tracking Production Readiness

**Purpose**: Validate specification completeness, security boundaries, and production readiness before proceeding to implementation.
**Created**: 2026-07-10
**Feature**: [../spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Does the specification define a registry or directory of valid `user_id` values allowed to log telemetry? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK002 Are the default fallback user profiles and behavior specified when a request does not contain a `user_id` or query parameter? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK003 Are static asset build, bucket configurations, or CloudFront routing requirements documented for the production deployment? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK004 Are CORS allowed domains explicitly defined to enforce zero-trust security on public API routes? [Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is the "compact unique user identifier" quantified with specific minimum/maximum character lengths or allowed character sets? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK006 Are the specific columns, padding, or margins for 'mobile-first responsive layouts' defined with explicit CSS breakpoints? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK007 Is the global `tracker_key` authorization token header key name explicitly defined for all API request contracts? [Clarity, Spec §Assumption 1]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK008 Do the dual-write pre-aggregation requirements for combined stats align across individual camper metrics and global standings? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK009 Are local storage browser preferences consistent with dynamic URL query parameter binding rules? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK010 Can the success criteria of 'sub-second QR code scan locking' (SC-005) be objectively verified with standard mobile camera parameters? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK011 Is the '500ms button submission disable throttle' testable and verified for all mutative form components? [Measurability, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK012 Are requirements specified for handling unregistered, malicious, or malformed `user_id` values POSTed to the API? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK013 Does the specification define what happens if the `camper#aggregates#combined` database write fails but the individual user write succeeds? [Coverage, Exception Flow, Gap]
- [ ] CHK014 Are the visual states, reconnection behaviors, and user feedbacks defined for intermittent network signal dead-zones? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 Are race conditions or concurrent writes to the combined aggregates partition addressed with atomic update requirements? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK016 Does the specification define how the system prevents a single user from triggering a global 'ResetDay' that clears other users' stats? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK017 Are rate-limiting or polling backoff requirements specified for the public dashboard to prevent Lambda request flooding under high production load? [Completeness, Gap]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
